daily_summary.headline: Falcon Heavy Launch and Aurora Opportunities Highlight April 29

top_events.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon Heavy is set to launch the ViaSat-3 F3 satellite to Geostationary Transfer Orbit. This mission showcases the heavy-lift capabilities of the Falcon Heavy rocket.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for spectacular liftoff visuals.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A moderate aurora event is expected with a Kp index of 4, offering potential viewing for those at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check aurora conditions if located above 65° latitude.

top_events.title: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight
top_events.description: The Soyuz-5 rocket is scheduled for a demonstration flight, marking a significant step in Russian space capabilities.
top_events.action: Follow updates for potential launch confirmation.

alerts.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3 Launch
alerts.message: SpaceX's Falcon Heavy is launching the ViaSat-3 F3 satellite to Geostationary Transfer Orbit. This mission highlights the heavy-lift capabilities of the Falcon Heavy rocket.
alerts.action_required: Watch live stream for spectacular liftoff visuals.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
